scripts.verify:all: echo '[smoke] detector connectivity' && node scripts/smoke-detector-connectivity.mjs && echo '[smoke] detector synthetic frame' && node scripts/smoke-detector-synthetic-frame.mjs && echo '[smoke] mask adapter' && node scripts/smoke-mask-adapter.mjs && echo '[smoke] satellite merge behavior' && node scripts/smoke-satellite-merge-behavior.mjs && echo '[smoke] candidate detection' && node scripts/smoke-run-candidate-detection.mjs && echo '[smoke] UI auto-detect wiring' && node scripts/smoke-ui-auto-detect-wiring.mjs && echo '[smoke] fallback duplicate source' && node scripts/smoke-fallback-duplicate-source.mjs && echo '[smoke] satellite merge gate source' && node scripts/smoke-satellite-merge-gate-source.mjs
scripts.smoke:detector: npm run prep && npm run verify:all
scripts.smoke:prep: npm run prep && npm run verify:prepared && node scripts/smoke-fallback-duplicate-source.mjs && node scripts/smoke-satellite-merge-gate-source.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run prep && npm run verify:all && tsc && vite build
scripts.build: npm run prep && npm run verify:prepared && tsc && vite build
